title: ResolvedMemory
description: Output of MemoryResolver.resolve(). Aggregates all MemoryEntry records produced by a DFS over @path references starting from the project-level CLAUDE.md, plus any personal-scope entries loaded from ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md. Serialization is deterministic: two independent resolver runs over identical source trees MUST produce byte-identical JSON when serialized with sort_keys=True. Constitution Principle V (SC-001, FR-005) and Principle VII.

schema_version.description: Bump on any breaking change to this contract.

project_root.description: Canonical absolute POSIX path of the repo root used for relative @path resolution.

entries.description: Resolved memory files, sorted by declaration_order. At minimum contains the root CLAUDE.md.

diagnostics.description: Non-fatal observations emitted during resolution. Fatal conditions raise a MemoryResolutionError instead of populating this array.

team_bytes_total.description: Sum of source_bytes across all entries with scope == 'team'. FR-007 / SC-003 / Principle III.

team_bytes_budget.description: Value of TEAM_MEMORY_MAX_BYTES at resolve time. team_bytes_total MUST be <= team_bytes_budget; strict greater raises OversizeMemoryError before this object is constructed.

resolved_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when resolution completed.
